articles.title: The S&P 500 just accomplished a first-time feat — and it suggests more wild swings ahead
articles.summary: The start to 2026 has brought no shortage of historic developments in global markets. Investors just witnessed another one over the past week.

articles.title: S&P 500 Equal Weight Index is outperforming S&P 500 by widest year-to-date margin since 1992
articles.summary: Something interesting is happening this year within the S&P 500 — evidenced when a different methodology is applied that gives a fixed weight to each of the 500 companies in the index. The S&P 500 Equal Weight Index is up 5.

articles.title: S&P 500, Dow muted after jobs data; Alphabet, Microsoft drag on Nasdaq
articles.summary: By Twesha Dikshit and Purvi Agarwal Feb 11 (Reuters) - Wall Street indexes lost steam on Wednesday following a renewed selloff in software stocks, while investors assessed stronger-than-expected employment data that lowered the bets on Federal Reserve interest-rate cuts.

articles.title: S&P 500 earnings beat expectations, up 12% YoY as positive momentum climbs
articles.summary: S&P 500 Q4 earnings are tracking ~12% YoY, beating forecasts as revenue momentum strengthens and AI investment drives outlook.

articles.title: These ETFs Handily Outperformed the S&P 500 in January, and They're Just Getting Started
articles.summary: These ETFs still look like great opportunities to buy into a major trend.
